trends.name: Kaner
trends.why_now: Blackhawks GM Kyle Davidson stated door is open for Kane's return; fans rallying with 'BRING KANER HOME' posts.
trends.angle: Capitalize on fan-driven reunion campaign: position as emotional homecoming + mentorship of young star Bedard.

example_tweets.text: BRING KANER HOME! 🙏🙏🙏 https://t.co/gaM4nuQzvy
Now that's Bedsy is signed let bring home Kaner!!! #Blackhawks https://t.co/HKLy4ILX6z
Ok, now sign Kaner. #Blackhawks

trends.name: Bedard
trends.why_now: Bedard matched Kane's 203-point rookie milestone; opening season on IR; co-trending with Kane reunion speculation.
trends.angle: Frame as generational talent milestone + injury concern: Bedard's early-career trajectory vs. Kane's mentorship potential.

example_tweets.text: [Celebrini and Bedard Not Pictured] https://t.co/X2Mr9iQuOD
Brutal news for Connor Bedard and the Blackhawks as he’ll open the season on IR. https://t.co/SZPKgjfQgK
Bring 88 Mr showtime Kaner Home he benefits every situation!!!! He helps our prospects, development and the team!!!!! Also our future Connor

trends.name: 8M AAV
trends.why_now: Co-trending with Kane/Blackhawks; AAV (average annual value) indicates contract negotiation details.
trends.angle: Contract speculation angle: Kane's salary expectations in reunion talks.

trends.name: Kyle Davidson
trends.why_now: TSN 1050 radio interview where he confirmed openness to Kane return; key decision-maker in Blackhawks' summer moves.
trends.angle: Position as architect of Blackhawks rebuild: his willingness to reunite Kane + Bedard signals confidence in contention.

trends.name: #Blackhawks
trends.why_now: Lineup speculation with Kane + Bedard + Bertuzzi; GM Davidson's radio interview fueling playoff-contention talk.
trends.angle: Build narrative around Blackhawks' potential 'Big Three' and playoff window opening.
